stdout:
The prior git-repo locking concern is addressed, but the implementation now creates a bogus `.git/jit` control plane for non-git repositories during init. That is an introduced behavioral regression in the scaffold path.

Review comment:

- [P2] Avoid creating .git in non-git init — /home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/mod.rs:552-557
  When `jit init` is run outside a Git repository, `WorktreePaths::detect()` returns `Ok` with `shared_jit = <cwd>/.git/jit` rather than `Err`, so this new lock path creates `<cwd>/.git/jit/locks` before scaffolding rules. That silently turns a non-git JIT directory into one with a bogus `.git` directory and contradicts the intended lockless non-git path; detect whether the returned paths are actually inside a Git worktree before creating the control-plane lock.
